title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 59.255 - Marginal release of deeds of trust book kept, certain counties
text:
59.255.  Marginal release of deeds of trust book kept, certain counties. — The recorder of deeds in each county wherein the offices of circuit clerk and recorder of deeds are separate and the circuit clerk and ex officio recorder of deeds in each county wherein the offices are combined shall keep in his or her office a record known as the "Marginal Release of Deeds of Trust" in which was recorded, at the time of the execution of a marginal release of a deed of trust, executed prior to August 28, 1991, the names of the grantors and grantees, the book and page of release, the date of release and to whom delivered.
(L. 1959 S.B. 171 § 1, A.L. 1965 p. 172, A.L. 2001 S.B. 288) 
Effective 7-01-01
